title: Sparse Telescope Array: Baseline Diversity in a Triangular Reserve
strategies: small-circle baseline: N stations equally spaced on a small concyclic ring about the incenter (reproduces the checker baseline, ~0.1)
incircle spread: equally spaced on the largest inscribed circle -- fatter thin-triple, a clear improvement over the baseline ring
stochastic optimization: simulated annealing over station coordinates (multi-start, seeded) maximizing the exact minimum triangle area, escaping the concyclic local optimum
invalid: emit stations outside the triangular reserve (scores 0)
